features: Negative Ion Feature: Elevate your hair styling experience with our negative ion thermal brush. Negative ions work wonders by sealing the hair cuticle, reducing frizz, and enhancing shine. Say goodbye to dull, lifeless hair and hello to smooth, lustrous locks with the transformative power of negative ions. Note: This item is not a hair dryer brush and cannot blow dry hair

5 Temperature Settings & LED Digital Display: Wavytalk thermal hair brush offers multiple temperature options, enabling better control during styling to achieve optimal results while minimizing heat damage. Use 150℃/165℃ for thin or damaged hair; 180℃ for normal hair; and 200℃/215℃ for thick or coarse hair

Curling Iron and Brush in One: The elongated heated bristles of this thermal brush effortlessly grip and glide through hair, helping to wrap the hair around the barrel seamlessly for flawless styling. The tourmaline ceramic barrel ensures even heat distribution, making it perfect for voluminous curls, airy styles, and creating glamorous fringe effortlessly

Double Acceleration Styling: The Wavytalk heated curling brush features two PTC heaters, quickly curling hair during brushing and saving 50% of time and effort. Streamline your daily routine: use the electric hair brush to eliminate the need for additional tools like combs or clips in traditional curling methods. Simplify the styling process for convenience and efficiency

Elevate Your Hair Game Effortlessly: Designed to create voluminous styles and achieve a sought-after blowout look. Whether you crave bouncy curls or glamorous waves, this versatile tool effortlessly adds volume and texture to your hair, giving you that salon-worthy finish with every use
Note: This item is not a hair dryer brush and cannot blow dry hair. The 38mm barrel of this product is better suited for medium and long hair lengths, not recommended for very short hair

Tips for Better Results How to Create Natural Waves for Medium-Long Hair? by@alexa_de Wrap the hair near the roots around the thermal brush barrel once (avoid overlapping). Slowly pull the brush downward toward the ends. When nearing the ends, rotate the brush upward toward the roots (letting the hair overlap), hold for a few seconds until you feel heat with your hand, then reverse the rotation to release the hair. After curling, apply a styling hairspray to lock in the curls and enhance longevity. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. Wavytalk Blowout Boost Ionic Thermal Brush Merchant video Tips for Better Results How to Create a Blowout for Medium-Long Hair? by@danielleathena Wrap the hair near the roots around the thermal brush barrel once (avoid overlapping). Slowly pull the brush downward toward the ends. As you near the ends, continue pulling while spinning the brush until the hair releases (you may need to hold the front section for support). After curling, apply a styling hairspray to lock in the curls and enhance longevity. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
